## Tags
cut here, along, snip, chop, stationery, crafts, instructions, diagram

## Categories
design, tools

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/scissors-line-dashed)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::ScissorsLineDashed;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        ScissorsLineDashed { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
